text:
あなたが引き受けてくれさえすれば
もう手に入ったも同然ね！
フフッ、褒めすぎかしら？

あ。も、もちろん無理したり
そういうことはナシで。
出来る範囲でいいんだからね？

あなたを信じて待ってるから
今回もよろしくお願いします

I love seeing that you've taken one of my
requests. It's like having a birthday present
coming! Heehee. Hope that's not too effusive.

Oh, but just to be clear, I don't want you to
go way out on a limb or anything, you know?
Just do what you can handle!

Well, I know you'll be equal to the task!
I'm counting on you!
